member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.AuditLog
member.summary: Domain entity representing a change-tracking audit log entry.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.AuditLog.CompanyId
member.summary: Gets the owner company ID.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.AuditLog.UserId
member.summary: Gets the user ID / username who made the modification.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.AuditLog.EntityName
member.summary: Gets the entity type name.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.AuditLog.EntityId
member.summary: Gets the entity primary key representation.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.AuditLog.Action
member.summary: Gets the modification action (e.g. Insert, Update, Delete).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.AuditLog.Changes
member.summary: Gets the changes formatted as a JSON string showing property differences.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.AuditLog.Timestamp
member.summary: Gets the UTC timestamp when the change was saved.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.AuditLog.CorrelationId
member.summary: Gets the correlation ID linking database operations together.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.AuditLog.Create(System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.DateTime,System.Guid)
member.summary: Factory method to construct an AuditLog entry.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.EntityEvent
member.summary: Domain entity representing a system-wide transactional event outbox log.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.EntityEvent.CompanyId
member.summary: Gets the owner company ID.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.EntityEvent.EventType
member.summary: Gets the system event type name (e.g. EmployeeCreatedEvent).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.EntityEvent.Payload
member.summary: Gets the serialized event payload.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.EntityEvent.OccurredOn
member.summary: Gets the UTC timestamp when this event occurred.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.EntityEvent.CorrelationId
member.summary: Gets the correlation ID of the logical transaction.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.EntityEvent.Create(System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.DateTime,System.Guid)
member.summary: Factory method to create an EntityEvent entry.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.ImportJob
member.summary: Domain entity representing a tracking record for spreadsheet imports.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.ImportJob.JobId
member.summary: Gets the unique Job ID.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.ImportJob.CompanyId
member.summary: Gets the owner company ID.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.ImportJob.ModuleName
member.summary: Gets the target module (e.g. Employees, Lookups).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.ImportJob.FileName
member.summary: Gets the source file name.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.ImportJob.Status
member.summary: Gets the processing status (Pending, Completed, Failed).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.ImportJob.ProcessedCount
member.summary: Gets the number of processed records.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.ImportJob.SuccessCount
member.summary: Gets the number of successfully validated records.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.ImportJob.FailureCount
member.summary: Gets the number of failed records.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.ImportJob.Payload
member.summary: Gets the JSON payload containing the validated records to import.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.ImportJob.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Gets the processing error message, if any.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.ImportJob.Create(System.Guid,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Factory method to create a new ImportJob.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.ImportJob.Complete
member.summary: Updates the job status to Completed.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.ImportJob.Fail(System.String)
member.summary: Updates the job status to Failed with an error message.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.SearchIndex
member.summary: Domain entity representing a search index entry for fast multi-tenant fuzzy text searches.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.SearchIndex.SearchId
member.summary: Gets the unique Search entry ID Guid.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.SearchIndex.EntityType
member.summary: Gets the indexed entity type name (e.g. Employee).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.SearchIndex.EntityId
member.summary: Gets the indexed entity's string primary key.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.SearchIndex.Content
member.summary: Gets the indexed searchable text content.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.SearchIndex.WeightedScore
member.summary: Gets the base weight/importance score of this search record.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.SearchIndex.LastUpdated
member.summary: Gets the UTC timestamp when this index was last updated.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.SearchIndex.CompanyId
member.summary: Gets the owner company ID.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.SearchIndex.Create(System.Guid,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.DateTime,System.Int32)
member.summary: Factory method to create a new SearchIndex entry.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.SearchIndex.Update(System.String,System.Int32,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Updates the searchable content and weight score.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Common.ArchivableEntity
member.summary: Extends with archiving attributes for Master Data entities that require audit-compliant archiving before any potential purge.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Common.ArchivableEntity.IsArchived
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this record has been archived.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Common.ArchivableEntity.ArchivedBy
member.summary: Gets the username of the user who archived this record.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Common.ArchivableEntity.ArchivedDate
member.summary: Gets the UTC timestamp when this record was archived.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Common.ArchivableEntity.ArchiveReason
member.summary: Gets the reason why this record was archived.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Common.ArchivableEntity.Archive(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Places this entity in the archived state.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Common.ArchivableEntity.Unarchive
member.summary: Restores an archived entity to an active state.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Common.AuditableEntity
member.summary: Extends with full audit trail fields as defined in Architecture.md §11. All mutable entities must inherit from this class.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Common.AuditableEntity.CreatedBy
member.summary: Username of the user who created this record (UTC).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Common.AuditableEntity.CreatedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp when this record was created.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Common.AuditableEntity.ModifiedBy
member.summary: Username of the user who last modified this record. Null if never modified.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Common.AuditableEntity.ModifiedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp of the last modification. Null if never modified.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Common.AuditableEntity.RowVersion
member.summary: EF Core-managed concurrency token (maps to SQL ROWVERSION). Prevents lost-update anomalies in concurrent multi-user scenarios.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Common.BaseEntity
member.summary: Base entity providing a strongly-typed integer primary key for all domain entities. No external dependencies.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Common.BaseEntity.DomainEvents
member.summary: Gets the read-only collection of domain events associated with the entity.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Common.BaseEntity.AddDomainEvent(FijiPayroll.Domain.Events.IDomainEvent)
member.summary: Registers a domain event.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Common.BaseEntity.ClearDomainEvents
member.summary: Clears the domain events.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Common.BaseEntity.Id
member.summary: Database-generated primary key. Zero indicates a transient (unsaved) entity.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Common.BaseEntity.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: Equality is determined by . Two transient entities (Id == 0) are never considered equal.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Common.SoftDeleteEntity
member.summary: Extends with soft-delete capability as specified in Database.md §1 (Soft Delete policy). Records are never physically deleted; filters them from queries.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Common.SoftDeleteEntity.IsDeleted
member.summary: true if this record has been logically deleted. EF Core global query filters exclude records where this is true.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Common.SoftDeleteEntity.DeletedBy
member.summary: Username of the user who deleted this record. Null if not deleted.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Common.SoftDeleteEntity.DeletedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp when this record was deleted. Null if not deleted.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Common.SoftDeleteEntity.SoftDelete(System.String)
member.summary: Marks this entity as logically deleted.
member.exception: Thrown if the entity is already deleted.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Common.SoftDeleteEntity.Restore
member.summary: Restores a soft-deleted entity to an active state.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.Company
member.summary: Domain aggregate representing a business tenant (Company) with profile, currency, timezone, and security configurations.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.Company.LegalName
member.summary: Gets the legal registered company name.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.Company.SecurityIsolatorKey
member.summary: Gets the unique cryptographic key used for database row-level security isolation.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.Company.TimeZone
member.summary: Gets the local time zone code (defaults to Fiji Standard Time).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.Company.DefaultCurrency
member.summary: Gets the default currency ISO code (defaults to FJD).

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.Company.Create(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Factory method to create a new Company tenant.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.Company.UpdateProfile(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Updates profile parameters of the company tenant.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.Employee
member.summary: Domain entity representing an employee and their master salary/statutory settings.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.Employee.CompanyId
member.summary: Foreign key to Company.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.Employee.FullName
member.summary: Employee's full name.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.Employee.Tin
member.summary: Tax Identification Number (TIN) from FRCS.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.Employee.FnpfNumber
member.summary: FNPF registration number.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.Employee.ResidencyStatus
member.summary: Residency status ("Resident" or "NonResident").

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.Employee.Department
member.summary: Employee's department.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.Employee.BaseSalary
member.summary: Base periodic salary or rate value.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.Employee.Frequency
member.summary: Target pay frequency.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.Employee.IsFnpfExempt
member.summary: True if employee is exempt from FNPF contributions.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.Employee.IsTaxExempt
member.summary: True if employee is exempt from PAYE taxes.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.Employee.IsActive
member.summary: True if employee is currently active.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.Employee.EmploymentType
member.summary: Gets the employment type.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.Employee.Branch
member.summary: Gets the employee's branch.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.Employee.Position
member.summary: Gets the employee's position.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.Employee.Email
member.summary: Gets the employee's email address.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.Employee.DataQualityScore
member.summary: Gets the data quality score for the employee record.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.Employee.PaymentMethods
member.summary: Gets the payment methods configured for this employee.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.Employee.AddPaymentMethod(FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.EmployeePaymentMethod)
member.summary: Adds a payment method to the employee.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.Employee.ClearPaymentMethods
member.summary: Clears all payment methods.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.Employee.RecalculateDataQualityScore
member.summary: Recalculates the data quality score for the employee record.
Factory method to create an Employee with optional new fields.
Updates employee properties.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.EmployeePaymentMethod
member.summary: Owned entity representing an employee's payment method configuration. Supports cash, cheque, bank transfer, and mobile transfer.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.EmployeePaymentMethod.MethodType
member.summary: Gets the payment method type.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.EmployeePaymentMethod.BankName
member.summary: Gets the bank name.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.EmployeePaymentMethod.BankAccountNumber
member.summary: Gets the bank account number.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.EmployeePaymentMethod.BankSortCode
member.summary: Gets the bank sort/routing code.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.EmployeePaymentMethod.MobileNumber
member.summary: Gets the mobile number (for M-PAiSA or MyCash).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.EmployeePaymentMethod.Percentage
member.summary: Gets the allocation percentage (e.g., 100 for single payment, or split).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.EmployeePaymentMethod.IsPrimary
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this is the primary payment method.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.EmployeePaymentMethod.Create(FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PaymentMethodType,System.Decimal,System.Boolean,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Factory method to create an EmployeePaymentMethod.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.MasterLookup
member.summary: Domain entity representing polymorphic reference lookup elements (Departments, Banks, positions, etc.). Supports parenting, ordering, and date-range validity.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.MasterLookup.CompanyId
member.summary: Gets the owner company ID.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.MasterLookup.Category
member.summary: Gets the category name (e.g., DEPARTMENTS, BANKS).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.MasterLookup.Code
member.summary: Gets the unique code of the lookup item.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.MasterLookup.Name
member.summary: Gets the descriptive name of the lookup item.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.MasterLookup.EffectiveFrom
member.summary: Gets the UTC start date of validity.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.MasterLookup.EffectiveTo
member.summary: Gets the UTC expiration date of validity.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.MasterLookup.ParentId
member.summary: Gets the parent lookup item ID for hierarchical data relationships.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.MasterLookup.DisplayOrder
member.summary: Gets the priority/sorting value.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.MasterLookup.IsActive
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this lookup item is active.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.MasterLookup.Create(System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.DateTime,System.DateTime,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Factory method to create a lookup data entry.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.MasterLookup.Update(System.String,System.DateTime,System.DateTime,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Updates properties of the lookup data entry.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent
member.summary:
Represents a configurable payroll component (earnings, deduction, allowance, benefit, or statutory item) that is applied during payroll calculation.
Maps to the company.PayrollComponents table as defined in Database.md §5.6.
Business rules enforced by this entity:
System components (PAYE, FNPF) cannot be deleted or deactivated.
A Formula component must have a non-empty Formula expression.
A Fixed or Percentage component must have a positive CalculationValue.
ComponentCode is always stored in uppercase, max 20 characters.
DisplayOrder must be non-negative.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.CompanyId
member.summary: Foreign key to company.Companies. Every component belongs to exactly one company.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.ComponentCode
member.summary: Short alphanumeric code uniquely identifying this component within the company (e.g., "BASIC", "HRA", "PAYE"). Always uppercase. Max 20 characters.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.ComponentName
member.summary: Human-readable display name shown on payslips and reports (e.g., "Housing Allowance"). Max 200 characters.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.ComponentType
member.summary: Classifies the component as an Earning, Deduction, Allowance, Benefit, or Statutory item.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.CalculationMethod
member.summary: Determines how the component amount is computed during payroll calculation.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.CalculationValue
member.summary: The dollar amount (for ) or percentage (for ). Null for Formula and Manual methods.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.Formula
member.summary: For components — the expression string. Supported variables: {GrossPay}, {AnnualSalary}, {HoursWorked}, {DailyRate}, {OvertimeHours}. Null for all other calculation methods.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.IsSystemComponent
member.summary: When true, this component is a built-in system component (PAYE, FNPF) that cannot be deleted or deactivated.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.IsTaxable
member.summary: When true, this component's value is included in the taxable income used for PAYE calculation.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.IsFnpfApplicable
member.summary: When true, this component's value is included in the FNPF-applicable gross used to calculate employee and employer FNPF contributions.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.DisplayOrder
member.summary: Controls the order in which this component appears on payslips and reports. Lower numbers appear first. Must be non-negative.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.Description
member.summary: Optional long-form description explaining the purpose or calculation logic. Max 500 characters.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.IsActive
member.summary: When false, this component is excluded from all payroll calculations. System components cannot be set to inactive.
Creates and validates a new instance.
member.param: Unique code within the company (max 20 chars, uppercase).
Amount or percentage; required for Fixed and Percentage methods.
Expression string; required for Formula method.
Whether this component is included in taxable income.
Whether this component is included in FNPF-applicable gross.
Reserved for seed data; system components cannot be modified.
member.exception: Thrown when business rules are violated.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.Update(System.String,FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComponentType,FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.CalculationMethod,System.Nullable{System.Decimal},System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Updates the component's name, calculation method, tax flags, and display order. System components have restricted editing — only name and display order can change.
member.param: Updated calculation method (restricted for system components).
member.exception: Thrown when a system component's restricted fields are changed.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.Activate
member.summary: Activates this component so it is included in payroll calculations.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.Deactivate
member.summary: Deactivates this component so it is excluded from future payroll calculations.
member.exception: Thrown if this is a system component — system components cannot be deactivated.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.SoftDelete(System.String)
member.summary: Logically deletes this component. Prevents use in future payroll runs.
member.exception: Thrown if this is a system component.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.Duplicate(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a deep copy of this component with a new code, name, and no system flag. Used for the "Duplicate" feature in the UI.
member.param: The code for the duplicated component.
The name for the duplicated component.
member.returns: A new unsaved with the same settings.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.Validate
member.summary: Evaluates whether this component has a valid configuration for the given calculation method. Returns a list of validation error messages.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent.SetCalculationValues(FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.CalculationMethod,System.Nullable{System.Decimal},System.String)
member.summary: Sets and cross-validates CalculationValue and Formula based on the chosen method.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.TaxBracket
member.summary: Represents a configuration-driven tax bracket for PAYE progressive tax calculations. Ensures historical reproducibility and audit reconstruction.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.TaxBracket.TaxVersion
member.summary: Version identifier of the tax ruleset (e.g., "2025-2026").

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.TaxBracket.ResidencyStatus
member.summary: Residency status of the employee (e.g., "Resident", "NonResident").

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.TaxBracket.Frequency
member.summary: Pay frequency of the pay group.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.TaxBracket.LowerLimit
member.summary: Lower boundary of taxable income for this bracket.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.TaxBracket.UpperLimit
member.summary: Upper boundary of taxable income for this bracket.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.TaxBracket.TaxRate
member.summary: Marginal tax rate for income falling within this bracket (expressed as decimal, e.g. 0.18).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.TaxBracket.FixedTaxAmount
member.summary: Fixed tax amount accumulated from previous tax brackets.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.TaxBracket.IsActive
member.summary: Active flag.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.TaxBracket.EffectiveDate
member.summary: Start date of this tax rule version validity.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.TaxBracket.Create(System.String,System.String,FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollFrequency,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Boolean,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Factory method to build a new TaxBracket.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRun
member.summary: Aggregate root representing a payroll run period. Enforces the state machine lifecycle, concurrency locking, and snapshots.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRun.CompanyId
member.summary: Foreign key to Company.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRun.RunCode
member.summary: Code identifying the run (e.g. "PR-2026-06-W01").

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRun.PeriodName
member.summary: Display name of the pay period (e.g. "June 2026 Week 1").

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRun.StartDate
member.summary: Start date of the pay period.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRun.EndDate
member.summary: End date of the pay period.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRun.PaymentDate
member.summary: Target bank disbursement/payment date.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRun.Frequency
member.summary: Pay frequency of the run.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRun.Status
member.summary: Current state machine status.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRun.Description
member.summary: Optional description of this run.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRun.LockedBy
member.summary: Username of the calculation lock owner.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRun.LockedAt
member.summary: Timestamp when calculation lock was acquired.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRun.CurrentRequestId
member.summary: Guid identifying the active calculation request (Idempotency check).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRun.SnapshotHash
member.summary: Deterministic hash of the input snapshot calculated by PayrollSnapshotHasher.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRun.Employees
member.summary: Set of employees computed in this run.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRun.StateHistory
member.summary: Transition history log for compliance audits.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRun.AddEmployee(FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunEmployee)
member.summary: Adds a run employee.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRun.AcquireLock(System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Acquires the calculation lock. Supports recovery of stuck locks (5-minute timeout).

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRun.ReleaseLockToCalculated(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Releases lock to Calculated and stores snapshot hash.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRun.ReleaseLockToDraft(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Releases lock back to Draft due to execution failure.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRun.Reset(System.String)
member.summary: Reset operation (Calculated -> Draft). Marks non-superseded employees as superseded. Non-chaining: Does not trigger calculation automatically.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRun.Approve(System.String)
member.summary: Approves the calculated payroll run.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRun.Post(System.String)
member.summary: Posts the approved payroll run.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRun.LockRun(System.String)
member.summary: Locks the posted payroll run.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRun.ReverseRun(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Reverses a posted or locked payroll run (financial correction).

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRun.Create(System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.DateTime,System.DateTime,System.DateTime,FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollFrequency,System.String)
member.summary: Factory method to build a new PayrollRun.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunEmployee
member.summary: Immutable snapshot record of an employee's calculation results within a payroll run. Marks past calculation results as superseded rather than performing destructive physical deletes.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunEmployee.PayrollRunId
member.summary: Foreign key to the PayrollRun header.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunEmployee.EmployeeId
member.summary: Reference identifier for the employee.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunEmployee.EmployeeName
member.summary: Frozen display name of the employee at calculation time.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunEmployee.Tin
member.summary: Frozen Tax Identification Number of the employee.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunEmployee.FnpfNumber
member.summary: Frozen FNPF registration number.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunEmployee.ResidencyStatus
member.summary: Residency status utilized for progressive tax calculation ("Resident", "NonResident").

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunEmployee.Department
member.summary: Department of the employee at calculation time.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunEmployee.BaseSalary
member.summary: Base pay/salary structure rate recorded.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunEmployee.GrossPay
member.summary: Calculated gross pay.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunEmployee.TotalAllowances
member.summary: Sum of all allowances.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunEmployee.TotalDeductions
member.summary: Sum of all deductions.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunEmployee.NetPay
member.summary: Take-home Net Pay amount.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunEmployee.PayeTax
member.summary: Computed PAYE income tax.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunEmployee.FnpfEmployeeContribution
member.summary: Computed FNPF employee portion contribution (typically 8%).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunEmployee.FnpfEmployerContribution
member.summary: Computed FNPF employer portion contribution (typically 10%).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunEmployee.TaxVersionUsed
member.summary: The tax table rule version applied.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunEmployee.IsSuperseded
member.summary: If true, this calculation record has been superseded by a subsequent recalculation attempt. Excluded from standard reports/slips.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunEmployee.CalculationRequestId
member.summary: Request correlation ID to ensure idempotency.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunEmployee.Trace
member.summary: Steps trace for audit debugging.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunEmployee.LineItems
member.summary: Detailed calculation component line items.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunEmployee.SetSuperseded
member.summary: Marks the record as superseded due to a recalculation.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunEmployee.AddLineItem(FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunLineItem)
member.summary: Appends a calculation line item.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunEmployee.SetTrace(FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunEmployeeTrace)
member.summary: Links the step trace.
Factory method to create a new run employee details snap.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunEmployeeTrace
member.summary: Detailed step-level calculation trace logs for audit debug tracing. Handled as append-only and immutable.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunEmployeeTrace.PayrollRunEmployeeId
member.summary: Foreign key back to the computed employee record.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunEmployeeTrace.TraceText
member.summary: Trace payload listing progressive calculation details, tax rules hit, FNPF etc.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunEmployeeTrace.Create(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Factory method to create a trace record.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunLineItem
member.summary: Detailed snapshot line item representing a component calculation (earnings, deductions, allowances) for a specific employee within a payroll run.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunLineItem.PayrollRunEmployeeId
member.summary: Foreign key to PayrollRunEmployee.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunLineItem.ComponentId
member.summary: The specific database component ID referenced at calculation time.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunLineItem.ComponentCode
member.summary: Code of the component (e.g. "BASIC", "PAYE", "FNPF-EMP").

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunLineItem.ComponentName
member.summary: Display name of the component.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunLineItem.ComponentType
member.summary: Component category.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunLineItem.Amount
member.summary: Calculated dollar amount.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunLineItem.IsTaxable
member.summary: Flag indicating whether the component is taxable.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunLineItem.AffectsFnpf
member.summary: Flag indicating if the component is subject to FNPF.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunLineItem.EmployerContributionFlag
member.summary: Flag indicating if this represents an employer contribution.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunLineItem.ReferenceComponentId
member.summary: Snapshot reference back to the original source component ID.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunLineItem.Create(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComponentType,System.Decimal,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Int32)
member.summary: Factory method to create a line item.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunStateHistory
member.summary: Audit record tracking state machine transitions for compliance audits.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunStateHistory.PayrollRunId
member.summary: Foreign key to PayrollRun.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunStateHistory.FromStatus
member.summary: Source status before the transition.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunStateHistory.ToStatus
member.summary: Destination status after the transition.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunStateHistory.ChangedBy
member.summary: Who triggered the state transition.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunStateHistory.ChangedAt
member.summary: Timestamp when the change occurred.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunStateHistory.Notes
member.summary: Compliance audit note explaining the transition.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunStateHistory.Create(System.Int32,FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollRunStatus,FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollRunStatus,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Factory method to create a status transition log.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.CalculationMethod
member.summary: Defines how the value of a payroll component is determined during payroll calculation. Corresponds to the CalculationMethod column in company.PayrollComponents.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.CalculationMethod.Fixed
member.summary: A fixed monetary amount applied every pay period, regardless of the employee's base pay (e.g., $500 Housing Allowance per month). The CalculationValue column holds the dollar amount.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.CalculationMethod.Percentage
member.summary: A percentage of the relevant base (typically gross pay or FNPF-applicable gross). The CalculationValue column holds the percentage (e.g., 8.0 for 8%).

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.CalculationMethod.Formula
member.summary: A user-defined formula expression evaluated at runtime. Supported variables: {GrossPay}, {AnnualSalary}, {HoursWorked}, {DailyRate}, {OvertimeHours}. The Formula column holds the expression text.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.CalculationMethod.Manual
member.summary: The value is entered manually per employee, per pay period during data entry. No default calculation is applied. Used for irregular payments such as one-off bonuses or ad-hoc allowances.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComponentType
member.summary: Defines the nature of a payroll component — whether it adds to or subtracts from an employee's gross pay, and how it is treated for tax and FNPF purposes.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComponentType.Earning
member.summary: A monetary payment that forms part of gross earnings (e.g., Basic Salary, Overtime Pay). Typically taxable and FNPF-applicable unless specifically excluded.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComponentType.Deduction
member.summary: A deduction subtracted from gross pay to arrive at net pay (e.g., Loan Repayment, Union Fees, Health Insurance). Not taxable (deductions reduce take-home, not tax base — PAYE is separate).

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComponentType.Allowance
member.summary: An additional payment on top of base salary, commonly for living expenses (e.g., Housing Allowance, Transport Allowance, Meal Allowance). Taxability and FNPF applicability are component-specific per FRCS rules.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComponentType.Benefit
member.summary: A non-cash or in-kind benefit provided to an employee (e.g., Vehicle Benefit, Health Insurance Employer Contribution). May or may not be taxable depending on FRCS treatment.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComponentType.Statutory
member.summary: A legislatively mandated deduction or contribution that cannot be disabled (e.g., PAYE Tax, FNPF Employee Contribution, FNPF Employer Contribution). System components cannot be deleted or deactivated.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.EmploymentType
member.summary: Defines the type of employment.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.EmploymentType.Permanent
member.summary: Permanent employee.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.EmploymentType.Contract
member.summary: Contractual employee with fixed duration.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.EmploymentType.Casual
member.summary: Casual hourly paid employee.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.EmploymentType.Temporary
member.summary: Temporary short-term employee.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.EmploymentType.Apprentice
member.summary: Apprentice/trainee employee.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PaymentMethodType
member.summary: Defines the payment method types supported by the payroll system.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PaymentMethodType.Cash
member.summary: Cash payment.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PaymentMethodType.Cheque
member.summary: Cheque payment.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PaymentMethodType.BankTransfer
member.summary: Direct bank transfer (EFT).

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PaymentMethodType.MobileTransfer
member.summary: Mobile transfer (M-PAiSA, MyCash).

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollFrequency
member.summary: Defines the payroll frequency — how often employees in a pay group are paid. Used to determine the number of pay periods per year and therefore the annualisation factor in PAYE calculations.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollFrequency.Weekly
member.summary: Paid every 7 days. 52 periods per year.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollFrequency.Fortnightly
member.summary: Paid every 14 days. 26 periods per year.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollFrequency.BiMonthly
member.summary: Paid twice per month (semi-monthly), typically on the 15th and last day. 24 periods per year.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollFrequency.Monthly
member.summary: Paid once per calendar month. 12 periods per year.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollRunStatus
member.summary: Defines the lifecycle status of a payroll run.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollRunStatus.Draft
member.summary: Run created, not yet calculated.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollRunStatus.Calculating
member.summary: Calculation is actively in progress. Acts as a lock.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollRunStatus.Calculated
member.summary: Calculated successfully, pending manager review.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollRunStatus.Approved
member.summary: Approved by an authorized manager, ready for posting.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollRunStatus.Posted
member.summary: Posted to general ledger. Financial corrections are active.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollRunStatus.Locked
member.summary: Run is closed and locked for auditing purposes.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollRunStatus.Reversed
member.summary: Financial correction state applied post-posting.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Events.EmployeeCreatedEvent
member.summary: Domain event raised when a new employee is successfully created.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Events.EmployeeCreatedEvent.Employee
member.summary: Gets the created employee entity reference.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Events.EmployeeCreatedEvent.CompanyId
member.summary: Gets the owner company ID.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Events.EmployeeCreatedEvent.EmployeeId
member.summary: Gets the employee's unique identifier.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Events.EmployeeCreatedEvent.FullName
member.summary: Gets the employee's full name.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Events.EmployeeCreatedEvent.Email
member.summary: Gets the employee's email address.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Events.EmployeeCreatedEvent.#ctor(FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.Employee)
member.summary: Initializes the event.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Events.EmployeeTerminatedEvent
member.summary: Domain event raised when an employee is terminated (deactivated).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Events.EmployeeTerminatedEvent.Employee
member.summary: Gets the terminated employee entity reference.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Events.EmployeeTerminatedEvent.CompanyId
member.summary: Gets the owner company ID.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Events.EmployeeTerminatedEvent.EmployeeId
member.summary: Gets the employee's unique identifier.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Events.EmployeeTerminatedEvent.TerminatedBy
member.summary: Gets the username of who terminated the employee.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Events.EmployeeTerminatedEvent.#ctor(FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.Employee,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes the event.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Events.EmployeeUpdatedEvent
member.summary: Domain event raised when an employee's properties are updated.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Events.EmployeeUpdatedEvent.Employee
member.summary: Gets the updated employee entity reference.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Events.EmployeeUpdatedEvent.CompanyId
member.summary: Gets the owner company ID.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Events.EmployeeUpdatedEvent.EmployeeId
member.summary: Gets the employee's unique identifier.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Events.EmployeeUpdatedEvent.FullName
member.summary: Gets the employee's full name.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Events.EmployeeUpdatedEvent.Email
member.summary: Gets the employee's email address.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Events.EmployeeUpdatedEvent.#ctor(FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.Employee)
member.summary: Initializes the event.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Events.IDomainEvent
member.summary: Marker interface for all domain events.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Events.IDomainEvent.OccurredOn
member.summary: Gets the UTC timestamp when the event occurred.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Exceptions.DomainException
member.summary: Base exception for all domain rule violations within the Fiji Payroll domain layer. Thrown when business invariants are broken (not for infrastructure or validation errors).

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IEmployeeRepository
member.summary: Repository interface for Employee entity operations.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IEmployeeRepository.GetByCompanyAndFrequencyAsync(System.Int32,FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollFrequency,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetches all active employees for the company and frequency, ordered by EmployeeId (Id) ascending at the database level.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IEmployeeRepository.GetByIdAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves an employee by their primary key.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IEmployeeRepository.AddAsync(FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.Employee,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Registers a new employee.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IImportJobRepository
member.summary: Contract interface for handling persistence operations on the entity.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IImportJobRepository.AddAsync(FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.ImportJob,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds a new ImportJob record asynchronously.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IImportJobRepository.GetByJobIdAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves an ImportJob by its unique JobId Guid.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IMasterLookupRepository
member.summary: Repository interface for entity operations.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IMasterLookupRepository.GetByIdAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a lookup by its primary key.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IMasterLookupRepository.GetByCategoryAsync(System.Int32,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves all lookups for a specific category within a company.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IMasterLookupRepository.CodeExistsAsync(System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Checks if a lookup code already exists in a category for a company.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IMasterLookupRepository.AddAsync(FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.MasterLookup,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds a new lookup item.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IMasterLookupRepository.Update(FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.MasterLookup)
member.summary: Updates an existing lookup item.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IPayrollComponentRepository
member.summary: Repository interface for aggregate. Provides data access methods specific to the payroll component domain. Implementations live in the Persistence layer.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IPayrollComponentRepository.GetByIdAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a payroll component by its primary key. Returns null if not found or soft-deleted.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IPayrollComponentRepository.GetByCompanyAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves all active (not soft-deleted) payroll components for a given company, ordered by ascending.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IPayrollComponentRepository.GetByCompanyAndTypeAsync(System.Int32,FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComponentType,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves active payroll components for a company filtered by type.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IPayrollComponentRepository.CodeExistsAsync(System.Int32,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns true if a component with already exists for the company (case-insensitive, excluding soft-deleted records).
member.param: Optional existing component ID to exclude from the check (used during updates).

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IPayrollComponentRepository.IsUsedInPayrollRunsAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns true if any payroll run detail references this component, indicating it cannot be safely deleted.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IPayrollComponentRepository.AddAsync(FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds a new to the persistence store. Caller must call to commit.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IPayrollComponentRepository.Update(FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.PayrollComponent)
member.summary: Marks a as modified in the change tracker. Caller must call to commit.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IPayrollComponentRepository.GetMaxDisplayOrderAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the maximum current DisplayOrder value for a company, useful for appending a new component at the end.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IPayrollComponentRepository.GetPagedAsync(System.Int32,System.String,System.Nullable{FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComponentType},System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a server-side filtered and paginated list of payroll components.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IPayrollRunRepository
member.summary: Repository interface for PayrollRun aggregate.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IPayrollRunRepository.GetByIdAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetches run by ID.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IPayrollRunRepository.GetByIdWithDetailsAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Eagerly loads the run aggregate along with non-superseded computed employee details, trace details, and lines.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IPayrollRunRepository.AcquireLockAsync(System.Int32,System.Guid,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Attempts to acquire the calculation lock on the payroll run. Validates request ID, handles timeout recovery, and prevents duplicate execution.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IPayrollRunRepository.AddAsync(FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRun,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds a new payroll run.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IPayrollRunRepository.GetPagedAsync(System.Int32,System.Nullable{FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollFrequency},System.Nullable{FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollRunStatus},System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns paged run summaries.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.ISearchIndexRepository
member.summary: Repository abstraction for SearchIndex aggregate.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.ISearchIndexRepository.AddAsync(FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.SearchIndex,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds a search index record.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.ISearchIndexRepository.Update(FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Audit.SearchIndex)
member.summary: Updates a search index record.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.ISearchIndexRepository.GetByEntityAsync(System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a search index record by its multi-tenant natural key.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.ISearchIndexRepository.GetByCompanyAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves all search index records for a given company.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.ISearchIndexRepository.SearchLikeAsync(System.Int32,System.String[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves search index records matching query terms using SQL LIKE fallback.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.ITaxBracketRepository
member.summary: Repository interface for configuration-driven tax brackets.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.ITaxBracketRepository.GetBracketsByVersionAndFrequencyAsync(System.String,FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollFrequency,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns tax brackets matching version and frequency, ordered by LowerLimit ascending.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.ITaxBracketRepository.AddAsync(FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.TaxBracket,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds a new tax bracket.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.ITaxBracketRepository.AnyAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Checks if any tax bracket exists (used in seeders).

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IUnitOfWork
member.summary: Unit of Work interface providing a single save-point for all repository operations. Ensures atomicity — either all changes within a business operation are committed, or none are. Implementations wrap EF Core's DbContext.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IUnitOfWork.PayrollComponents
member.summary: Repository for payroll component operations.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IUnitOfWork.PayrollRuns
member.summary: Repository for payroll runs aggregate operations.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IUnitOfWork.Employees
member.summary: Repository for employee master operations.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IUnitOfWork.TaxBrackets
member.summary: Repository for tax rules operations.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IUnitOfWork.MasterLookups
member.summary: Repository for master lookup operations.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IUnitOfWork.ImportJobs
member.summary: Repository for import job operations.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IUnitOfWork.SearchIndexes
member.summary: Repository for search index operations.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IUnitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Persists all pending changes tracked by EF Core to the database in a single atomic operation.
member.returns: The number of state entries written to the database.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IUnitOfWork.BeginTransactionAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Begins an explicit database transaction for operations that span multiple save points. Use only when a single is insufficient.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IUnitOfWork.CommitTransactionAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Commits the active explicit transaction.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IUnitOfWork.RollbackTransactionAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Rolls back the active explicit transaction.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Rules.PayrollRules.PayrollAllowanceEngine
member.summary: Pure stateless engine evaluating allowance amounts based on component configuration.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Rules.PayrollRules.PayrollAllowanceEngine.CalculateAllowance(FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.CalculationMethod,System.Nullable{System.Decimal},System.String,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Nullable{System.Decimal})
member.summary: Computes the allowance value for the current period based on calculation method.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Rules.PayrollRules.PayrollDeductionEngine
member.summary: Pure stateless engine for FNPF deductions and contributions calculations.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Rules.PayrollRules.PayrollDeductionEngine.CalculateEmployeeFnpf(System.Decimal,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Calculates the FNPF employee portion (8% of applicable gross) rounded half up.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Rules.PayrollRules.PayrollDeductionEngine.CalculateEmployerFnpf(System.Decimal,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Calculates the FNPF employer portion (10% of applicable gross) rounded half up.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Domain.Rules.PayrollRules.PayrollTaxEngine
member.summary: Pure stateless engine calculating PAYE progressive tax using configuration-driven tax brackets.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Domain.Rules.PayrollRules.PayrollTaxEngine.CalculatePaye(System.Decimal,System.Decimal,FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollFrequency,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Company.TaxBracket})
member.summary: Calculates period PAYE tax by annualising gross taxable income, applying progressive brackets, and de-annualising.
